title: Definitions
doc_html:
§132.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1984, No. 841, §2, eff. July 13, 1984; Acts 1988, No. 455, §1, eff. July 10, 1988; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

*15 U.S.C. §77B ET SEQ.
